questionHtml:
The dotted line represents the formation of oxygen, O2(g), from the uncatalysed complete decomposition of hydrogen peroxide, H2O2 (aq).

Which curve represents a catalysed reaction under the same conditions?

meta.title: The dotted line represents the formation of oxygen, O2(g), from the uncatalysed complete decomposition of hydrogen peroxide, H2O2 (aq). Which curve represents a catalysed reaction
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
